heading: View Network Containers
body:
**Atlascli:**

Atlas CLI

To list all network peering containers for your project using the
Atlas CLI, run the following command:

```sh

atlas networking containers list [options]

```

To learn more about the command syntax and parameters, see the
Atlas CLI documentation for [atlas networking containers list](atlas/cli/current/command/atlas-networking-containers-list).

**Api:**

Atlas Administration API

To view your network containers, see [Return All Network Peering Containers for One Project](api/doc/atlas-admin-api-v2/operation/operation-listgroupcontainerall).
